name: 8.9qt Open Front Stackable Storage Bin - Brightroom™
description:
Designed for busy garages and workshops, the Brightroom Large Heavy-Duty Stackable Storage Bin makes tools and supplies easy to reach—even while stacked. This durable plastic storage container features an open top design and a convenient drop-front panel, allowing you to view, store, and retrieve items quickly without unstacking bins. The rugged construction with a textured finish wipes clean easily, and tabs at the base with a grooved rim allow bins to stack securely. Mix and match the three sizes to maximize vertical space and create a custom storage system for your garage, basement, or mudroom.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
